title: Foundation and task routing
description: Small routing skills that prevent Codex from loading implementation knowledge before it knows the task, repository, and evidence requirements.

title: Schema and research lookup
description: Narrow research skills for CWTools, vanilla diffs, trigger/effect docs, and unresolved semantics.

title: Script surfaces
description: Implementation and validation skills for repeatable Paradox-script surfaces such as scripted triggers, effects, values, events, and on_actions.

title: AI, economy, planets, and workforce
description: AI economy and planet-development skills split by actual control surface.

title: Gameplay domains
description: Discrete gameplay-domain skills for technologies, empire setup, diplomacy, war, crises, and 4.x-specific concepts.

title: Ships, warfare, and starbases
description: Ship graph, component, behavior, fleet, starbase, and army skills kept separate from generic combat balance.

title: Megastructures
description: Megastructure implementation, AI planning, and high-power megastructure safety.

title: UI, localization, and assets
description: Player-facing text, GUI, sprites, resources, portraits, audio, map/system asset, and DDS pipeline skills.

title: Validation and diagnostics
description: Static validation, runtime-log review, active-playset inspection, observer testing, regression reports, and custom audit tooling.

title: Active-stack compatibility
description: Compatibility skills for major live-stack mods, separated from vanilla/schema skills.

title: Packaging, release, and porting
description: Release, Workshop, compatibility-patch, and version-porting workflow skills.
